message:
feat(engine): add 103 deep unit tests across 4 modules for edge-case coverage

Enrich modules with lowest test-to-LOC ratios:
- npm_compatibility_matrix.rs: 34→77 tests (+43) — verdict logic, normalization,
  state machine transitions, overflow guards, canonical values, serde roundtrips
- causal_intervention_dag.rs: 34→58 tests (+24) — latent confounders, front-door
  identification, diamond DAG, long chains, serde for all enum variants
- entropic_policy_morphing.rs: 36→60 tests (+24) — entropy calculations, budget
  exhaustion by distance, ln_millionths edge cases, policy distance with missing dims
- esm_cjs_interop_parity.rs: 35→47 tests (+12) — hex encoding, corpus validation,
  artifact paths serde, evidence-corpus ID matching

All cargo check + cargo clippy --lib pass clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
